free_text: Reliable cross  sections  of   partial   photoneutron
reactions  on  188,189Os  isotopes  free  of neutron
The  joint  analysis  of   data  for  total (g,xn) and
in  various  experiments was  carried  out.  The  new
approach  to  analysis  of  systematic  disagreements
between data was proposed on the base of new criteria
Using  these functions calculated in  the  frame  of
combined photonuclear  reaction  model  new reliable
and free from problems of   neutron   multiplicity
sorting data for photoneutron   partial  reactions
were  evaluated  using   experimental  neutron yield
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
